wooden_door.name: Wooden Door
wooden_door.notes: Locked: thieves' tools DC 15 to pick. Force open: STR DC 15.

iron_door.name: Iron Door
iron_door.notes: Force open: STR DC 25. Most weapons can't dent it.

wooden_chest.name: Wooden Chest
wooden_chest.notes: Locked: thieves' tools DC 12. Trapped chests: DM resolves traps.

statue.name: Stone Statue
statue.notes: Heavy. Falling on a creature: 2d10 bludgeoning, DEX save DC 13 for half.

glass_window.name: Glass Window
glass_window.notes: Shatters loudly. Creatures in 5ft of broken glass take 1 slashing per square moved (barefoot).

wooden_wall.name: Wooden Wall (5ft section)
wooden_wall.notes: Reduces sight + projectiles. Loud when breached.

brick_wall.name: Brick Wall (5ft section)
brick_wall.notes: Solid. Resistant to most weapons; magic and siege weapons are best.

heavy_crate.name: Heavy Crate
heavy_crate.notes: Counts as half cover. Difficult terrain when broken.

barrel.name: Barrel
barrel.notes: Cheap rolling cover. Often holds ale, oil, or pickled fish.
